name: Falling Devil
description:
Is it a strange place to put your dick in? Yes. Would I still do it? Yes also. Go bazoonkas on the chef lady. Pussy probably has teeth or something idk.

After being called to clean up another scene, you arrive to find a very suspiciously tall woman figure standing there. Spotting you, she's now forcing you to taste her food, maybe if you be a good human and do it she'll give you a reward? Who knows.

Sauce: my bad i forgot who drew this ;3

PS: THANK YOU FOR 200 FOLLOWERS YOU GUYS ARE SO SIGMA, I HOPE YOU ENJOY THIS BOT, SORRY FOR THE LONG DELAY :P
